# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

version: "3.9"

services:
  redis-master:
    image: redis:7
    container_name: redis-master
    command:
      - redis-server
      - --appendonly
      - "yes"
      - --min-replicas-to-write
      - "0"
      - --min-replicas-max-lag
      - "10"
      - --protected-mode
      - "no"
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    networks:
      - redis-net

  redis-slave:
    image: redis:7
    container_name: redis-slave
    depends_on:
      - redis-master
    command:
      - redis-server
      - --replicaof
      - redis-master
      - "6379"
      - --protected-mode
      - "no"
    ports:
      - "6380:6379"
    networks:
      - redis-net

networks:
  redis-net:
    driver: bridge
